name: Keychron Q1 Pro Matte White Mechanical Keyboard
description: A premium 75% layout mechanical keyboard crafted from a full aluminum body with a matte white finish, designed for minimalist desk setups. Features hot-swappable switches, QMK/VIA support for deep customization, and a double-gasket structure that delivers a soft, muted typing sound. Ideal for developers, writers, and designers who value tactile feedback, quiet acoustics, and a clean aesthetic workspace.

name: NuPhy Air75 Low-Profile Wireless Keyboard
description: A slim and portable low-profile mechanical keyboard with a modern floating key design and ultra-thin aluminum frame. Equipped with low-profile switches for fast, responsive typing and multi-device wireless connectivity via Bluetooth and USB-C. Perfect for users who need a lightweight keyboard for travel, coffee shop work sessions, or maintaining a minimal and clutter-free desk.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Pale Grey Edition
description: An ergonomic wireless mouse engineered for precision and comfort, featuring an advanced 8K DPI sensor that tracks flawlessly on glass and smooth surfaces. Includes ultra-quiet clicks, a magnetic MagSpeed scroll wheel for fast or precise scrolling, and customizable buttons optimized for productivity apps like Figma, Photoshop, and coding environments. The pale grey finish complements neutral and aesthetic desk setups.

name: Logitech Pebble 2 Minimal Wireless Mouse
description: A compact and ultra-quiet wireless mouse with a slim, pebble-shaped design that fits easily into bags and small workspaces. Features silent clicking technology, dual connectivity via Bluetooth and USB receiver, and long battery life. Ideal for students, remote workers, and anyone building a clean, minimal desk environment with portable accessories.

name: Apple Magic Trackpad Matte White
description: A minimalist glass-surface trackpad with Force Touch technology and full multi-touch gesture support, designed for seamless navigation across macOS workflows. Offers precise cursor control, smooth scrolling, and intuitive gestures for productivity tasks like coding, design, and browsing. The matte white finish pairs perfectly with clean, Apple-inspired desk aesthetics.

name: Dell UltraSharp 27” 4K USB-C Monitor
description: A professional-grade 27-inch 4K monitor with ultra-thin bezels and accurate color reproduction, supporting 99% sRGB coverage for design and content work. Includes USB-C connectivity for single-cable laptop charging and display output, reducing cable clutter. Ideal for developers, UI/UX designers, and creators seeking sharp visuals and a clean, minimal workstation.

name: LG DualUp Vertical Monitor 28MQ780
description: A unique 28-inch vertical dual-format monitor with a 16:18 aspect ratio, effectively replacing a dual-monitor setup while saving desk space. Designed for multitasking, coding, and document-heavy workflows, it allows simultaneous viewing of multiple windows with minimal distraction. Clean industrial design makes it a standout piece in modern minimalist workspaces.

name: CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt Dock
description: A premium Thunderbolt 4 docking station with a minimalist aluminum chassis, offering up to 18 ports including USB-C, DisplayPort, Ethernet, and SD card slots. Provides high-speed data transfer, dual monitor support, and 98W laptop charging through a single cable. Perfect for professionals who want a clean, organized desk with maximum connectivity.

name: Satechi Aluminum USB-C Hub Slim
description: A slim multi-port USB-C hub with a brushed aluminum finish that seamlessly matches modern laptops. Includes HDMI output, USB-A ports, SD card reader, and USB-C pass-through charging. Designed for users who need essential connectivity without sacrificing a clean and minimal desk appearance.

name: BenQ ScreenBar Halo Monitor Light
description: A premium monitor-mounted light bar that provides soft, glare-free illumination for late-night work sessions. Features adjustable brightness and color temperature, along with a wireless control dial for easy adjustments. Designed to reduce eye strain while keeping your desk free from bulky lamps, making it ideal for minimalist setups.

name: Solid Oak Minimal Writing Desk Natural Finish
description: A handcrafted minimalist writing desk made from solid oak wood, featuring a natural grain finish that brings warmth and calm into your workspace. Designed with clean Scandinavian lines and a spacious surface for laptop setups, notebooks, and daily essentials. Ideal for creators, remote workers, and students who value a clutter-free environment, natural materials, and timeless desk aesthetics.

name: Japandi Low Floor Desk Walnut
description: A low-profile floor desk inspired by Japanese and Scandinavian design principles, combining walnut wood tones with a grounded sitting posture. Perfect for floor seating setups, meditation-inspired workspaces, and creative environments. Encourages better posture awareness while maintaining a calm, aesthetic workspace free from visual clutter.

name: Minimal Standing Desk Matte White Frame
description: A height-adjustable standing desk with a matte white steel frame and soft-touch surface, designed for ergonomic work sessions and modern minimalist interiors. Features smooth motorized height transitions and cable management for a clean setup. Ideal for developers, designers, and remote workers looking to alternate between sitting and standing while maintaining a sleek workspace.

name: Curved Edge Minimal Desk Light Walnut
description: A modern desk featuring softly curved edges and a light walnut finish, designed to create a calming and organic workspace. The rounded form reduces visual sharpness and blends seamlessly into contemporary interiors. Includes subtle storage drawers to keep essentials organized while preserving a clean desk surface.

name: Minimal Open Shelf Desk Ash Wood
description: A functional desk crafted from ash wood with integrated open shelving for books, devices, and accessories. Designed to support productivity while maintaining an airy, uncluttered look. Perfect for small spaces, studio apartments, and minimal desk setups where storage and aesthetics need to coexist.

name: Ergonomic Lounge Work Chair Fabric Beige
description: A soft ergonomic lounge chair with a wide seat and neutral beige fabric, designed for relaxed working and long reading sessions. Features subtle lumbar support and a low-profile silhouette that complements minimalist interiors. Ideal for casual workspaces, creative studios, and aesthetic home offices.

name: Scandinavian Mesh Ergonomic Chair Light Grey
description: A breathable ergonomic chair with a light grey mesh back and minimal frame design, offering lumbar support without visual bulk. Designed for long work sessions while maintaining a clean and modern aesthetic. Ideal for pairing with neutral-toned desks and minimalist office environments.

name: Solid Wood Floating Desk Wall Mounted
description: A space-saving floating desk made from solid wood, mounted directly to the wall for a clean and modern look. Ideal for small rooms and minimal setups, providing just enough surface for a laptop and essentials while eliminating bulky furniture. Enhances visual openness and simplicity in compact workspaces.

name: Minimal Storage Cabinet Soft Beige
description: A compact storage cabinet with soft beige tones and hidden handles, designed to blend seamlessly into minimalist interiors. Provides discreet storage for documents, cables, and accessories while maintaining a clean visual flow in your workspace.

name: Oak Bench Seat Minimal Workspace
description: A solid oak bench with a simple, elongated design that can be used as alternative seating or a flexible workspace element. Works well in collaborative setups, entryway workstations, or aesthetic studio environments. Emphasizes natural materials and open, adaptable design.

name: Nothing Ear (2) Transparent Wireless Earbuds
description: Minimalist true wireless earbuds with a transparent industrial design that exposes internal components, creating a unique tech aesthetic. Features high-resolution audio support, active noise cancellation, and customizable EQ tuning. Designed for creators and developers who value both sound clarity and design identity, ideal for focused work sessions, commuting, and immersive listening.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Matte Black Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear wireless headphones with industry-leading noise cancellation and a refined matte black finish. Designed for distraction-free environments, these headphones feature adaptive sound control, ultra-soft ear cushions, and balanced audio tuning for long listening sessions. Perfect for deep work, travel, and productivity-focused users seeking immersive silence and comfort.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen) Minimal White
description: Compact wireless earbuds with a clean white finish and seamless ecosystem integration. Features active noise cancellation, transparency mode, and spatial audio for an immersive yet natural listening experience. Designed for everyday use, quick device switching, and comfortable long-term wear, making them ideal for both casual listening and focused workflows.

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones Sandstone
description: Elegant over-ear headphones in a soft sandstone finish, combining premium noise cancellation with a warm, balanced sound signature. Designed for comfort and minimal visual distraction, featuring plush ear cushions and a lightweight frame. Ideal for users who want a calm aesthetic while maintaining immersive audio for long work or study sessions.

name: Marshall Motif II A.N.C. Black Earbuds
description: Wireless earbuds inspired by classic Marshall design, featuring a textured black finish and subtle gold accents. Offers active noise cancellation, strong bass response, and a compact form factor. Designed for users who appreciate a vintage-inspired aesthetic combined with modern wireless convenience and immersive audio performance.

name: Audio-Technica ATH-M50x Studio Monitor Headphones
description: Professional studio monitor headphones known for accurate sound reproduction and neutral audio profile. Designed for creators, editors, and developers working with audio, offering detailed mids and clear highs. Features a durable build and comfortable ear pads for extended use, ideal for focused listening and production environments.

name: Bang & Olufsen Beoplay HX Timber Wireless Headphones
description: Luxury wireless headphones featuring a minimalist Scandinavian design with premium materials and a soft timber-toned finish. Delivers balanced, high-fidelity sound with active noise cancellation and long battery life. Designed for users who value craftsmanship, subtle aesthetics, and immersive audio quality in a refined form.

name: Sonos Roam Portable Smart Speaker Lunar White
description: A compact smart speaker with a clean white finish, designed for seamless indoor and outdoor use. Features balanced sound tuning, voice assistant integration, and multi-room connectivity. Ideal for minimalist setups where design consistency and subtle audio presence are important.

name: KEF LSX II Wireless HiFi Speakers Matte Black
description: Compact high-fidelity bookshelf speakers with a matte black finish and modern minimalist design. Delivers detailed stereo sound with built-in streaming support and wireless connectivity. Perfect for desktop setups, creative studios, or living spaces where both sound quality and visual aesthetics matter.

name: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless Headphones White
description: Minimalist wireless headphones with a clean white finish and exceptional battery life. Offers balanced audio tuning, adaptive noise cancellation, and a comfortable lightweight design. Built for long listening sessions, deep focus work, and users who prefer a subtle, modern aesthetic without visual distractions.

name: Neighbor Dry Pond Alves II Sunglasses
description: Blending together classic Wellington and Boston styles, these sunglasses are timeless. They are made of premium Italian acetate in slate blue and built with sculpted wire frame arms, seven-bar hinges, and silver-tone pin accents at the temples. The black lenses offer complete UV protection with an anti-reflective coating.

name: Neighbor Dry Pond Salvi Sunglasses
description: Square-eyed sunglasses in a translucent, slate blue, Italian cellulose acetate. Built with sculpted wire frame arms, five bar hinges, and silver tone pin accents at the temples. Completed with natural pearl nose pads and dark grey CR39 lenses with an anti-reflective coating.

name: Neighbor Dry Pond Schade Sunglasses
description: A rounded rectangle style frame in a translucent, slate blue, Italian, cellulose acetate. Built with sculpted wire frame arms, five bar hinges, and silver tone pin accents at the temples. Completed and dark brown CR39 lenses with an anti-reflective coating.

name: Neighbor Our Legacy Earth Churred Toffe Sunglasses
description: Rounded rectangular frame sunglasses built from Italian Mazzuchelli cellulose acetate in a transparent tortoise. Feature dark brown Carl Zeiss lenses with a category 3 filter and anti-scratch coating. Completed with a three-bar hinge and silver studs at the temples.

name: Neighbor Our Legacy Sahmain Infinite Black Sunglasses
description: Thick-framed rectangular sunglasses built from Italian Mazzuchelli cellulose acetate in black. Feature green Carl Zeiss lenses with a category 3 filter and anti-scratch coating. Completed with a three-bar hinge.

name: Neighbor Sun Buddy Alma Sunglasses
description: An easy and classic browline style frame in black with silver wire. Each pair is handmade of Italian Mazzucchelli acetate and uses optical class 1 lenses with 100% UV protection. They also feature  a seven bar hinge with two visible rivets on the temple. These sunglasses come in a hard faux leather case with a cleaning cloth.

name: Ray-Ban Meta Wayfarer - Gen 2
description: Iconic frames that stop a room, and technology that lets you move effortlessly through it. A style pioneer from Hollywood to hip-hop, the Wayfarer never stands still. Forever embraced by the next generation of culture makers, now its journey continues with advanced Meta AI. Capture photos and videos, listen to music and podcasts, make a call, translate in real time, even send a text on the fly all without taking out your phone.

name: Ray-Ban Meta Skyler - Gen 2
description: Tap into iconic style and advanced technology designed to help you move effortlessly through life. Drawing on our 60s archive and the Golden Age of air travel, the Skyler shape is inspired by an era of iconic jet-set style. Its narrow front and gentle curves are designed to suit smaller faces. Now with advanced Meta AI, capture photos and videos, listen to music and podcasts, make a call, translate in real time, even send a text on the fly – all without taking out your phone.

name: Ray-Ban Meta Low Bridge Fit Headliner - Gen 2
description: With Ray-Ban Meta Headliner you can express yourself with the most unique perspective there is – yours. Now equipped with advanced Meta AI, you can capture photos and videos, listen to music and podcasts, make a call, translate in real time, even send a text on the fly – all without taking out your phone. With a smooth panthos shape, the Headliner is a hybrid of the Wayfarer and the Round, bringing together the best of two icons.

name: Ray-Ban Meta Headliner - Gen 2
description: With Ray-Ban Meta Headliner you can express yourself with the most unique perspective there is – yours. Now equipped with advanced Meta AI, you can capture photos and videos, listen to music and podcasts, make a call, translate in real time, even send a text on the fly – all without taking out your phone. With a smooth panthos shape, the Headliner is a hybrid of the Wayfarer and the Round, bringing together the best of two icons.

name: Grovemade Wood Headphone Stand
description: The Grovemade Wood Headphone Stand is a bold statement piece for your desk. We focused on the form and the build quality to make something worth keeping on display, and something that’s heavy enough (2.25 lbs) to hold still while in use.

name: Grovemade Wood MagSafe Stand
description: Our stand is purpose-built to capitalize on the speed and convenience of MagSafe charging while also being a delight to use. A solid steel base securely anchors your device, and hand sanded hardwood and vegetable-tanned leather create a unique modern look. m and the build quality to make something worth keeping on display, and something that’s heavy enough (2.25 lbs) to hold still while in use.

name: Grovemade Wood iPad Stand
description: Our iPad stand is designed to hold your iPad at just the right angle for viewing and working. It's built with premium American hardwood and stainless steel, with merino wool felt to cushion and protect your device. Integrated cord management keeps your desk tidy.

name: Grovemade Wood Laptop Riser
description: Our laptop riser lifts your screen extra high for ideal ergonomics, combined with a small, stable footprint that fits into the tight spaces at your desk. Merino wool felt protects and cushions your device.

name: Grovemade Wood Monitor Stand
description: The Grovemade Monitor Stand is a graceful ergonomic boost for your posture and your desktop, bringing your monitor to eye level while you work. Constructed from premium molded plywood, it supports up to 200 pounds, while its minimal footprint provides ample space below to stow your desktop accessories.

name: Grovemade Wood Display Rail
description: The display rail organizes the space between your keyboard and monitor. Soft merino wool felt cradles AirPod cases, phones, notes, photos, playing cards—you name it. The hardwood back and bent steel rail give a solid form to your space, with a natural cork foot to protect your desk. Keep your things easily in sight and near at hand.

name: Grovemade Wood Pen Stand + Desk Pen + Ink Refill
description: Precision machined from solid aluminum, the Grovemade Desk Pen has a single piece body built to last a lifetime. A durable anodized finish protects and highlights the pen. Machined entirely in the Portland area to ensure the highest quality.

name: Grovemade Wood Pen Cup
description: Each hardwood pen cup is carved from solid maple or walnut, with a stainless steel divider for added functionality. It is hand sanded and finished to highlight the natural warmth and beauty of the wood. It's a sculptural, modern organizer for your desk.

name: Grovemade Wood Leather & Wood Mouse Pad
description: Our leather and wood mousepad combines a supple, vegetable-tanned leather surface for mousing with a hand sanded hardwood pen tray to keep your writing utensils close by. An aluminum chassis gives a firm base to your mousepad, keeping the lines on your desk nice and crisp. A cork foot protects your desk, and gives you just the right amount of cushion.

name: Grovemade Wood Notebook Stand
description: Designed to save you space on your desk, the Grovemade MacBook Dock is an elegant vertical laptop stand that transforms your workspace. Premium hardwood and stainless steel provide beautiful heft for easy one handed operation. Your MacBook is cradled and protected by a lining of merino wool felt. Natural cork feet protect your desktop.
